image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Here's what science actually says about the replication crisis.
Context visual: The replication crisis means many scientific studies can't be duplicated, raising questions about their validity.
Escalation visual: Imagine investing years into research, only to find out it might be built on shaky ground.
Evidence visual: Studies show up to 70% of psychology findings fail replication.
Payoff visual: This challenges not only research methods but also public trust in science.
Cta visual: Curious about how we can fix this? Hit subscribe for more insights!
